data.name: Jackie Snape Clicker
data.detailed_description:
A bold brunette with an icy blue gaze, a confident smile, and a fiery personality that instantly turns you on. She loves experiments and is definitely not the type to follow anyone else's rules. One click — and you're already in her game. The further you go, the less clothing she has on… and the more she lets you see.

Jackie Snape Clicker [18+] — this is more than just a clicker. It's a slow, addictive dive into the story of a girl who reveals herself in new ways every time… and gets hotter with every step.

What awaits you:

  • 156 unique illustrations — from a cold, confident vixen to fully nude, passionate, and very explicit hot scenes

  • Real, tangible progression: every action matters. The more you click and upgrade, the bolder, wetter, and more shameless Jackie becomes

  • Powerful upgrade and acceleration system — level up faster and unlock new, even hotter stages and secrets

  • An atmosphere of light defiance, intrigue, and growing sexual tension that's hard to pull away from

  • Simple but highly addictive gameplay that gradually turns into real seduction

Brutal Jackie doesn't rush to reveal all her secrets at once. With each level, you'll get to know her a little deeper — and perhaps she'll let you see far more than anyone else. From light teasing to moments when she completely loses control and gives herself to you alone.

Are you ready to find out where the clicker ends… and something much hotter and more forbidden begins?

data.short_description: Jackie Snape is a bold brunette with an icy stare and a body built for sin. Click, upgrade, and watch her slowly strip and lose control. 156 explicit illustrations, deep progression, and rising heat. Ready to push the cold vixen to her limit?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB display memory
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB display memory
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB display memory
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
